scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w backend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backend
scripts.docker:prod:up:local: EDGE_HTTP_PORT=8080 EDGE_HTTPS_PORT=8443 docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d
scripts.format: oxfmt --write .gitignore .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json package.json backend frontend docs/.vitepress/config.ts docs/api docs/development docs/guide docs/index.md docs/changelog.md docs/public/images CHANGELOG.md docker-compose.yml docker-compose.prod.yml docker-compose.testing.yml README.md
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check .gitignore .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json package.json backend frontend docs/.vitepress/config.ts docs/api docs/development docs/guide docs/index.md docs/changelog.md docs/public/images CHANGELOG.md docker-compose.yml docker-compose.prod.yml docker-compose.testing.yml README.md
scripts.test: npm run test -w frontend && npm run test -w backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w frontend && npm run typecheck -w backend
